zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine FitzReynald於1261年出生在英國薩默塞特修頓時，她的父親Reginald FitzPiers54歲，母親Alice Stanford42歲。她於1277年7月20日與John Pichard結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine FitzReynald于1261年出生在英国薩默塞特修頓时，她的父亲Reginald FitzPiers54岁，母亲Alice Stanford42岁。她于1277年7月20日与John Pichard结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine FitzReynald was born in 1261, in Chewton, Somerset, England, her father, Reginald FitzPiers, was 54 and her mother, Alice Stanford, was 42. She married John Pichard on 20 July 1277. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters.

fr.Tretower, Breconshire, Wales: Tretower, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine FitzReynald est née en 1261, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Reginald FitzPiers, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Alice Stanford, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé John Pichard le 20 juillet 1277. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine FitzReynald 1261 in Chewton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald FitzPiers 54 und ihre Mutter Alice Stanford 42. Sie hat am 20. Juli 1277 John Pichard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter.

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine FitzReynald(이)가 1261년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald FitzPiers(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Stanford(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1277년 7월 20일 John Pichard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine FitzReynald родилась в 1261 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald FitzPiers было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Stanford, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Pichard 20 июля 1277 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери.
